title: Concord Voice electron-updater manifest
description: Shape of latest.yml / latest-mac.yml / latest-linux.yml produced by the release job in .github/workflows/build-desktop.yml. Single source of truth for both generation (scripts/generate-update-manifest.mts) and read-side verification (scripts/verify-update-manifest.mjs). See docs/policies/update-trust-model.md for the governing trust model.

version.description: Release semver triple: MAJOR.MINOR.PATCH. No pre-release or build metadata suffix — release tags are bare semver.

files.description: Per-platform artifact list. electron-updater downloads files[*].url and verifies their bytes against files[*].sha512 before applying the update.

url.description: Artifact filename (relative to the manifest location on the release server).

sha512.description: Base64-encoded SHA-512 digest of the artifact bytes. SHA-512 over 64 bytes encodes to exactly 88 base64 characters: 86 payload + '==' padding. Regex enforces both the structure (payload chars followed by exactly two '=') and length is implicit in the pattern (86 + 2 = 88).

size.description: Artifact size in bytes (matches the on-disk size of the file at files[*].url).

blockMapSize.description: Byte size of the sibling <url>.blockmap file (electron-builder differential-download block manifest). Present only for macOS .zip entries; omitted for platforms without a blockmap.

releaseDate.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the release was generated. Used by electron-updater for staged-rollout decisions.
